title: neomammillaria subcrocea
intro: Neomammillaria subcrocea, also known as the Dwarf Mammillaria or Small Ball Cactus, is a small, globular cactus species native to Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Neomammillaria subcrocea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its stems, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
